sql: SELECT id, name, email, status FROM users WHERE status = 'active' UNION ALL SELECT id, name, email, status FROM users WHERE status = 'pending' UNION ALL SELECT id, name, email, status FROM users WHERE status = 'inactive' ORDER BY #{sortField}
templateSql:
SELECT <include refid="Frag_UserBasic"/> FROM users WHERE status = 'active'
UNION ALL
SELECT <include refid="Frag_UserBasic"/> FROM users WHERE status = 'pending'
UNION ALL
SELECT <include refid="Frag_UserBasic"/> FROM users WHERE status = 'inactive'
<if test="sortField != null">
    ORDER BY ${sortField}
</if>
